ogTitle: Blackford vs Blair Athol: Climate Safety

heading: Blackford vs Blair Athol — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blackford, South Australia and Blair Athol, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blair Athol has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Blackford (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blackford or Blair Athol safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blackford has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Blair Athol scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blackford scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Blair Athol scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blackford or Blair Athol?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blair Athol has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
